steps.title: Identify what the passage is fundamentally about
steps.content: The passage focuses on how a special tool enabled researchers to determine which kilns produced the recovered bowls.

steps.title: Match this focus to the choices
steps.content:
C directly matches the passage: it states that a special tool helped determine the origin of bowls.

  • A shifts to discovering and recovering shipwrecks
  • B misinterprets it as discovering kiln locations rather than matching bowls to known sources
  • D adds a pre-invention comparison absent from the passage
.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
